assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: owners of small and growing businesses in Suriname who need a clearer online presence

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Many local prospects first encounter a business on a phone while distracted or on the move.
creative_strategy.message_angle: Mobile clarity is a service experience, not merely a technical feature.
creative_strategy.hook: If it is hard on a phone, it is hard to choose.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A one-handed real-world use moment will communicate mobile usability more credibly than device mockups alone.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a customer comfortably navigating a clean abstract service flow on a phone with one hand
visual_direction.action: the customer moves from a clear service card to one obvious contact action without visual friction
visual_direction.environment: a contemporary cafe terrace in Paramaribo during an ordinary workday
visual_direction.composition: close editorial crop on hand and phone in lower-center, soft human context behind, empty upper-right copy area
visual_direction.lighting: bright diffused tropical daylight with controlled screen glow and natural skin tone
visual_direction.style: authentic premium lifestyle photography with crisp product-detail focus

copy.overlay_headline: If it is hard on a phone, it is hard to choose.
copy.caption: A website should remain clear, fast, and easy to use on the device customers reach for first. Zenta designs mobile-first contact journeys.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a customer comfortably navigating a clean abstract service flow on a phone with one hand. Show the customer moves from a clear service card to one obvious contact action without visual friction. Set the scene in a contemporary cafe terrace in Paramaribo during an ordinary workday. Composition: close editorial crop on hand and phone in lower-center, soft human context behind, empty upper-right copy area. Lighting: bright diffused tropical daylight with controlled screen glow and natural skin tone. Visual style: authentic premium lifestyle photography with crisp product-detail focus. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'Mobile clarity is a service experience, not merely a technical feature.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'If it is hard on a phone, it is hard to choose.', support line 'Websites + Google visibility', and CTA 'Build mobile first' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid oversized floating phones, fake browser text, or staged smiling-at-screen stock photography, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
oversized floating phones, fake browser text, or staged smiling-at-screen stock photography

accessibility.alt_text: A customer uses a simple mobile service flow with one hand at a cafe table.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the website package and any stated price against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
